strengths: Accessing high-quality instructional content to understand proper technique
Learning correct needle manipulation and tissue handling principles
weaknesses: Not performing actual task attempts for skill development
Missing hands-on practice with timing and performance pressure

drills.name: Mark-to-mark needle path drill
drills.description: Practice 15 needle passes through both marked targets before attempting any knot tying to build muscle memory.
drills.targets_weakness: Not performing actual task attempts for skill development.

drills.name: Knot-pusher sequencing drill
drills.description: Complete 10 three-throw extracorporeal sequences with deliberate pusher advancement to develop consistent technique.
drills.targets_weakness: Missing hands-on practice with timing and performance pressure.

progression_note: At the intermediate level, transition from studying technique to active practice sessions with actual task performance and timing measurement.
